News: The Ritz-Carlton, Melbourne opened on March 23, 2023 as the brand's first Australian property — a 257-room tower rising 80 storeys on Lonsdale Street in Melbourne's CBD.

Marriott signed a record 114 luxury deals in 2025 and reported luxury brand RevPAR growth of more than 6% for the full year — well ahead of the overall portfolio average. Key openings included the St. Regis Aruba, Lake Como EDITION, and Nekajui, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve in Costa Rica.

Waldorf Astoria New York welcomed its first hotel guests on July 15, 2025 after an eight-year, $2B+ restoration — reopening with 375 rooms and 372 private residences. The restored Grand Ballroom reopened September 5, 2025.

"Within luxury, we continued to build strong momentum after the Waldorf Astoria New York opening, and in the Fourth Quarter, we opened our second Waldorf Astoria in Shanghai and celebrated the brand's debut in Helsinki."
Park Hyatt London River Thames opened on October 8, 2024 in Nine Elms, South West London — the first Park Hyatt in the United Kingdom, with 203 rooms.
"Leisure transient RevPAR increased about 6% year over year, including 9% growth across luxury brands."
Six Senses Southern Dunes, The Red Sea opened in November 2023 in Umluj, Saudi Arabia — 76 eco-luxury tented villas and the first property to open at The Red Sea destination.

"Altogether we delivered another excellent set of results, demonstrating the strength and resilience of our business model and the power of our growth algorithm, despite some turbulent trading conditions. RevPAR growth, system growth, and margin expansion collectively drove a 13 percent increase in EBIT."
Raffles London at The OWO opened on September 29, 2023 — 120 rooms and suites in the restored Old War Office on Whitehall, London; the first Raffles hotel in the United Kingdom.

Orient Express La Dolce Vita made its grand premiere on April 4, 2025 at Roma Ostiense Station. Italy's first luxury train features 12 carriages (max 62 passengers) with cuisine by Michelin 3-star chef Heinz Beck, designed by Dimorestudio.
Fairmont Doha opened on November 22, 2022 in Katara Towers (Lusail) — ahead of the FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022. The 362-room tower shares the iconic Crossing Swords complex with Raffles Doha.
